[event]
# Brazier sound effect
type=event
location=19,12,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[event]
# Barrel
type=event
location=17,18,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,17,18,288
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Barrel

[event]
# Turrent
type=event
location=13,11,1,1
activate=static
cooldown=1s
power=377
power_level=hero_level,1
power_path=13,11;13,17
power_stats=enemies/map_powers/il_shock_turrent.txt
repeat=true

[event]
# Turrent
type=event
location=14,16,1,1

power=377
power_level=hero_level,1
power_path=14,16;14,10
power_stats=enemies/map_powers/il_shock_turrent.txt
repeat=true
